ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "pm1" REAL /* PM1 value */,
  "pm2_5" REAL /* PM2.5 value */,
  "pm10" REAL /* PM10 value */,
  "bin0" INTEGER /* bin0 value */,
  "bin1" INTEGER /* bin1 value */,
  "bin2" INTEGER /* bin2 value */,
  "bin3" INTEGER /* bin3 value */,
  "bin4" INTEGER /* bin4 value */,
  "bin5" INTEGER /* bin5 value */,
  "bin6" INTEGER /* bin6 value */,
  "bin7" INTEGER /* bin7 value */,
  "bin8" INTEGER /* bin8 value */,
  "bin9" INTEGER /* bin9 value */,
  "bin10" INTEGER /* bin10 value */,
  "bin11" INTEGER /* bin11 value */,
  "bin12" INTEGER /* bin12 value */,
  "bin13" INTEGER /* bin13 value */,
  "bin14" INTEGER /* bin14 value */,
  "bin15" INTEGER /* bin15 value */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature value */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity value */,
  "battery" REAL /* Battery level */,
  "no2_ae" INTEGER /* NO2 AE value */,
  "no2_we" INTEGER /* NO2 WE value */,
  "o3_ae" INTEGER /* O3 AE value */,
  "o3_we" INTEGER /* O3 WE value */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "data_validity" TEXT /* Validity of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule */,
  "pollutant_type" TEXT /* Type of pollutant the sensor measures */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the sensor collects data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "pollutant_type" TEXT /* Type of pollutant */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "data_validity" TEXT /* Validity of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "key" TEXT /* API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the API key */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data point
ID of the location where the data was collected
ID of the sensor that collected the data
ID of the location where the sensor is installed
Type of pollutant the sensor measures
Frequency at which the sensor collects data
Unique identifier for each data point
ID of the sensor that collected the data
Unique identifier for each API key
ID of the user associated with the API key
Date and time the API key was created
Date and time the API key expires
